title: Sogeking Joins the Rescue
description: The rescue force reaches Enies Lobby, where the island’s guards and government agents prepare to stop the Straw Hats.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Kumadori, Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. The rescue force reaches Enies Lobby, where the island’s guards and government agents prepare to stop the Straw Hats.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We'd almost caught up to Sanji!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kumadori
dialogue.text: Then you smacked us off the track!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: No no!! They didn't Kidnap me!!

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: The old lady is talking to Yokozuna!

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: Hoping to get stronger, haven't you...?

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: Right now, we're chasing after him!

dialogue.speaker: Oimo
dialogue.text: Do you want to come with us!?

dialogue.speaker: Oimo
dialogue.text: NGagaga! Sure, whatever you wanna call me.

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: Let's go! We're almost there! Charge!!

summary: The rescue force reaches Enies Lobby, where the island’s guards and government agents prepare to stop the Straw Hats.
